name: Base64 Encoded File or Command Execution
description: Detects base64 encoded payloads being decoded and executed
query:
// Detect base64 decoding followed by execution
// Trigger on certutil decode or base64 in command lines
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(certutil.*-decode|base64\s+-d|\[Convert\]::FromBase64String|echo.*\|.*base64)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
